agent_analysis.hypothesis_rationale: ZIP codes with higher log property values (ZHVI) reflect higher household wealth, which directly yields higher total contributions for local nonprofits.
agent_analysis.prior_art_notes: Bielefeld (2000) shows headquarters selection correlates with regional socioeconomic capital indicators.
agent_analysis.interpretation: A statistically significant positive correlation was found. Nonprofits located in higher-cost log real estate zones receive higher total contributions, reflecting the higher donor capacity in wealthy local markets.
